title: Cluster
description: Monitor workers, task distribution, results, and remote storage configuration.

nodes.title: Workers
nodes.description: Connection state, scheduling eligibility, and provider capability pools for every Worker.
nodes.empty: No workers have connected to this Coordinator.
nodes.name: Worker
nodes.confirm_disable: Disable this worker? New tasks will not be assigned and the current connection will close.
nodes.confirm_revoke: Revoke this worker? It must be enrolled again before it can reconnect.

jobs.title: Task board
jobs.description: Track parent batches and media transfers, retry failures, and inspect immutable task context.
jobs.empty: No cluster tasks match the current filter.
jobs.confirm_retry: Retry this task? A compatible worker will receive a new attempt.
jobs.confirm_clear_failed: Clear all failed tasks from the active board? They remain archived for audit.

results.title: Upload results
results.empty: No Worker upload results have been received.

overview.title: Cluster overview
overview.description: Current Worker availability, task health, and recently reported uploads.

filters.keyword: Task ID, media, Worker, or error

empty.jobs_description: Tasks will appear here after a subscription or manual dispatch creates them.
empty.nodes_description: Start a Worker and connect it to this Coordinator to begin scheduling.
empty.results_description: Completed Worker uploads and ETF manifests will appear here.

confirm.clear_failed_jobs: Clear all failed tasks from the active board? They remain archived for audit.
confirm.revoke_node: Revoke this Worker? It must be enrolled again before it can reconnect.

job_details.title: Task details
job_details.invalid_context: The stored task context is not valid JSON.

queue.title: Worker durable queues
queue.unavailable: Queue statistics are available only when this OpenList instance runs as a Worker.

control.title: Worker configuration
control.absolute_path_hint: Use an absolute, non-root OpenList path.

secrets.title: Credentials
secrets.description: Credential values are encrypted by the Coordinator and are never returned by the API.
secrets.empty: No cluster credentials have been saved.
secrets.value_placeholder: Enter a JSON object containing the driver credential fields.
secrets.invalid_json: Credential value must be a non-empty JSON object.
secrets.confirm_revoke: Revoke this credential? New storage configuration cannot use it.

storage.title: Remote storage profiles
storage.empty: No remote storage profiles have been configured.
storage.parameters_placeholder: Enter non-secret driver fields as a JSON object.
storage.invalid_parameters: Storage parameters must be a JSON object.

audit.title: Control audit log
audit.empty: No cluster control changes have been recorded.

settings.title: Cluster settings
settings.description: Choose how this OpenList instance participates in the cluster and configure its service connections.
settings.active_role_help: This is the role used by the running process and changes only after restart.
settings.worker_key_file_help: Persistent path used to store the Worker identity key.
settings.node_id_help: Use a stable, unique ID. Changing it can register this instance as a new node.

role_help.standalone: Cluster features are disabled and this instance runs independently.
role_help.coordinator: Schedules tasks, saves ETF files, and sends target-service notifications.
role_help.worker: Receives transfer tasks from a remote Coordinator and reports ETF manifests.
role_help.hybrid: Runs the Coordinator and also executes transfer tasks on this instance.

settings.coordinator_url_help: Use wss:// when the Coordinator is reached over an untrusted network.
settings.enrollment_token_help: Leave empty to keep the saved token. Enter a value to replace it.
settings.etf_root_path_help: Legacy compatibility field. New scheduling and delivery semantics use provider bindings and provider+folder targets.
settings.target_api_token_help: Leave empty to keep the saved token. Enter a value to replace it.
settings.target_supports_idempotency_help: Enable only when repeated notifications with the same key are safely deduplicated.
settings.redis_password_help: Leave empty to keep the saved password. Enter a value to replace it.
settings.redis_require_aof_help: Prevents the Worker from accepting tasks when Redis cannot confirm durable result storage.
settings.secret_configured: Configured, enter a new value to replace
settings.restart_warning: Saving writes the runtime configuration. Restart OpenList to apply role or connection changes.
settings.environment_override_warning: Cluster environment variables take precedence over values saved here. Remove an override before changing that field in this page.
settings.saved_restart_required: Cluster settings saved. Restart OpenList to apply the changes.

errors.coordinator_disabled: Cluster Coordinator is disabled on this instance
